Pep Guardiola warns Man City to avoid potential ‘big mistake’ ahead of Forest clash
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has highlighted the “big mistake” he wants Manchester City to avoid as they bid to turnaround their awful form in the Premier League. The reigning champions head into Wednesday evening’s meeting with Nottingham Forest in Eastlands without a win in seven games in all competitions, including four consecutive defeats in the league. arts.ttl: Arne Slot vs. Pep Guardiola: Liverpool boss tactically outshone Manchester City in Premier League title race clash at Anfield
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot produced a tactical masterclass against Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and effectively knocked the champions out of the title race.

arts.sum: Manchester City trails Liverpool by 11 points in the Premier League as the team goes through its toughest stretch under Guardiola.

arts.sum: Stefan Ortega came in for Ederson against Liverpol after the Brazilian made an error in Manchester City's 3-3 draw against Feyenoord, with Pep Guardiola opting to make a change amid their torrid run of form

arts.ttl: Brighton star continues to milk Manchester City win – Had a specific plan to stop Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion defender Jan Paul van Hecke has revealed his plan to keep Erling Haaland quiet as he continues to milk the 2-1 win over Manchester City. Voetbal Nieuws cover comments from the Brighton defender today made to the D’n Hoefcast podcast, in which the subject of Haaland was brought up once again.
